name: board-game-engine
description: Play board games together: private hands on phones, shared board on the TV. Imports Tabletop Simulator workshop assets.

scripts.start: npm run build -w client && npm run dev -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p client/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --forceConsistentCasingInFileNames --resolveJsonModule shared/src/index.ts server/src/index.ts
